nasb.text: Then Moses said to the Lord, “See, You say to me, ‘Bring up this people!’ But You Yourself have not let me know whom You will send with me. Moreover, You have said, ‘I have known you by name, and you have also found favor in My sight.’

esv.text: Moses said to the Lord, “See, you say to me, ‘Bring up this people,’ but you have not let me know whom you will send with me. Yet you have said, ‘I know you by name, and you have also found favor in my sight.’

cnv.text: 摩西對耶和華說：“看，你吩咐我說：‘把這百姓領上去’，可是你卻沒有讓我知道你要差派誰與我同去；只是你曾經說過：‘我按著你的名字認識你，你在我眼前也蒙了恩。’

ccb.text: 摩西对耶和华说：“你吩咐我带领这些百姓，却没有告诉我你将要派谁与我同去，只说，‘我凭名字认识你，你在我面前蒙了恩。’
